title: stelis cobanensis
intro: Stelis cobanensis, also known as Cobanella, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). It is native to Central America and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, making it a potential remedy for various respiratory health benefits, including relieving congestion and soothing irritated airways. In herbal preparations, Stelis cobanensis can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
